context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel simulation
context.role: Container for seeds, displays food level (full/low/empty)
context.usage_scenario: Player clicks to fill with seeds, Echo eats from it, visually shows 3 states based on food_level

visual_specification.shape: Small bowl viewed from slight angle, oval opening

animation.description: 3 separate states: Full (6-8 seeds visible), Low (3-4 seeds), Empty (brown bowl only)

visual_specification.details: Bowl is brown (#AB5236) with dark interior (#5F574F), 16x12px total size. Full state: 6-8 yellow seeds (#FFA300) 3x3px each clustered in bowl. Low state: 3-4 seeds visible. Empty state: just brown bowl outline with dark interior, no seeds

relationships.shared_with: Water bowl shares similar bowl design

explicit_negations: No gradual seed depletion animation (instant state changes only)
No size changes between states (only contents change)
